{"society_power": 8.0, "state_power": 9.0, "society_change": 1.0, "state_change": 0.0, "key_event": "Civil rights and Great Society: simultaneous mobilization and state-building", "reasoning": "The Civil Rights Movement, TV-amplified mass mobilization, campus/New Left organizing, and expanded Black political participation sharply strengthened civil society, while the already-overwhelming state saw offsetting forces\u2014Great Society expansion and Vietnam war powers pushing up against COINTELPRO surveillance and coercive responses that were themselves checked by an increasingly assertive society."}
